LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARIADB USA, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION AND DENIED AS TO THE 3RD AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 5, 2018 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302 TO ALLOW FURTHER BRIEFING ON THE EXTRA TERRITORIALITY ISSUE WITHOUT LIMITATION, INCLUDING THE CONFLICT OF LAWS ASPECT OF IT AND THE APPLICATION OF THE SO-CALLED MULTIFACETED APPROACH. THE PARTIES CAN FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF BY AUGUST 23, 2018 AND THE 2ND ROUND OF BRIEFING TO BE FILED BY AUGUST 29, 2018. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Mariadb Usa, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Jeremy Golan of the Golan Law, Tel. No. 1-310-558-0424 appearing for the
Plaintiff by telephone appearance;
Atty. Jonathan Longine of the Perkins Coie, Tel. No. 1-415-344-7000 appearing for
the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant MariaDB USA, Inc's Motion for Summary Judgment, or in the alternative summary adjudication - Motion for summary judgment is denied. Motion for summary adjudication is Granted as to the 5th cause of action and Denied as to the 3rd and 4th causes of action. Summary adjudication as to the 1st and 2nd causes of action is continued to September 5, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 to allow further briefing on the extra territoriality issue without limitation, including the conflict of laws aspect of it and the application of the so-called multifaceted approach. The parties can file a Supplemental brief by August 23, 2018 and the 2nd round of briefing to be filed by August 29, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEREMY GOLAN O THE GOLAN LAW, P.C., TEL. NO. 1-310-558-0424 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JONATHAN S. LONGINO OF PERKINS COIE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-344-7189 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARIADB USA, INC. DEMURRER to COMPLAINT - Defendant MariaDB USA, Inc.'s demurrer to all five causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Jessica Taylor is overruled as to all five causes of action. MariaDB does not cite any authority, and the court is not aware of any, requiring a plaintiff alleging violations of the California Labor Code to allege facts showing that the California Labor Code applies to the employment. MariaDB's request for judicial notice is denied as to both exhibits 1 and 2. Neither of those exhibits contains facts that are not reasonably subject to dispute. The critical choice of law issue in this case is not amenable to resolution on this demurrer. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
